name: CPT Procedure Code
summary: Detects CPT (Current Procedural Terminology) codes with context markers
description: Detects CPT procedure codes in healthcare documents. Matches 5-digit CPT codes (00100-99499) and Category II/III codes (e.g., 0042F, 0019T). Requires context keywords to reduce false positives from arbitrary 5-digit numbers.

metadata.compliance_notes: CPT codes linked to a patient constitute PHI under HIPAA. CPT is maintained by the AMA.
metadata.format: 5 digits (00100-99499) or 4 digits + F/T suffix (Category II/III)
metadata.false_positive_notes: Context keywords required to avoid matching arbitrary 5-digit numbers

effect.message: CPT procedure code redacted per HIPAA when linked to patient identity
